summary: Spec root cause appears wrong: ALL MCP artifact write helpers fetch the REST API (:9002) and those REST routes already broadcast *_created/_updated/_deleted (api.ts 1526/842/1026/1752/1973); UI App.tsx already handles them (addDocument/addDiagram/addDesign). The MCP create path DOES broadcast via the REST handler it calls — the prescribed 'broadcast from tool fns' fix is a no-op or causes double-broadcast on the REST path. retryCount 5. Escalated for re-validation rather than guessing.
